install.title: Get PromptLens running in 60 seconds.
install.subtitle: Install from the Chrome Web Store, or download the offline package if you can't reach Google services.

storeCard.title: Chrome Web Store
storeCard.description: One-click install. Auto-updates whenever a new version ships.
storeCard.feature3: Works on Chrome, Edge, Brave, Arc

zipCard.title: Direct ZIP download
zipCard.description: For users behind firewalls or without access to Google services. Fully self-contained — no account, no telemetry.

steps.title: Load the unpacked extension in 4 steps.

step1.title: Unzip the package
step1.body: Right-click the downloaded promptlens-chrome-0.2.0.zip and choose Extract / Unzip. You'll get a folder named promptlens-chrome-0.2.0/.

step2.title: Open Chrome's Extensions page
step2.body: Paste this into your address bar:

step3.title: Toggle Developer mode
step3.body: Top-right of the Extensions page — flip the Developer mode switch on. Three buttons appear (Load unpacked / Pack extension / Update).

step4.title: Load unpacked
step4.body: Click Load unpacked, then pick the unzipped folder. PromptLens appears in your toolbar — pin it for the keyboard shortcut (⌘⇧Y on Mac, Ctrl+Shift+Y on Windows / Linux).

steps.caveat: Offline-installed extensions don't auto-update. When a new version ships, repeat steps 1–4 (or switch to the Chrome Web Store version once the firewall is no longer in your way).

hero.subtitle: Style Prompt, Product Visual, Web Design — three ways to turn any image into structured creative intelligence. Local-first, zero server.

problem.title: Describing a reference image takes longer than designing it.

multiProvider.title: Multi-Provider
multiProvider.description: OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama — switch providers without switching workflows.

analysisModes.title: 3 Analysis Modes
analysisModes.description: Style Prompt, Product Visual, Web Design — three specialized AI lenses for any image.

dtcgTokens.title: Design Tokens
dtcgTokens.description: Web Design mode outputs DTCG-compliant design tokens: colors, fonts, spacing, radius, shadows.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Press ⌘⇧Y anywhere to capture any region. Never leave your creative flow.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: No logs, no proxy. Your images and API keys never touch our servers.

export.title: Export
export.description: One-click copy, JSON export, or Markdown — wherever your workflow lives.

platforms.title: Browser, Mac, and Windows — all covered.

pricing.title: Free forever. Always yours.
pricing.subtitle: No accounts. No telemetry by default. No vendor lock-in.
pricing.subtitleLine2: Your data stays on your device.
pricing.bullet1: Your API keys stay in your browser
pricing.bullet2: Your images never leave your device
